name: pngtuber
description: Audio-reactive PNG avatar that switches poses based on voice

device.label: Audio Device
device.tooltip: Microphone or audio input to monitor for voice

threshold.label: Volume Threshold
threshold.tooltip: Audio level (0-255) that triggers the talking state

holdTime.label: Hold Time (ms)
holdTime.tooltip: How long to stay in talking state after audio drops below threshold (prevents flickering)

frequencyMin.label: Frequency Min (Hz)
frequencyMin.tooltip: Lower bound of frequency range to monitor (85 for typical voice)

frequencyMax.label: Frequency Max (Hz)
frequencyMax.tooltip: Upper bound of frequency range to monitor (300 for typical voice)

blinkImage.label: Blink Image
blinkImage.tooltip: Optional PNG overlaid during blink (leave empty to disable)

blinkDuration.label: Blink Duration (ms)
blinkDuration.tooltip: How long the blink lasts in milliseconds

bounce.label: Bounce on Talk
bounce.tooltip: Add a small bounce animation when switching to talking

bounceAmount.label: Bounce Pixels
bounceAmount.tooltip: How many pixels to bounce up when talking
